recommended_paths: block implementation until concrete test matrix is part of the TODO
exact_next_step: Record reviewer resolutions in the governing TODO using the machine-checkable resolution table or equivalent gate ledger, then extract the derived resolution packet and decide whether another bounded review pass is still required.

findings.title: WhatsApp hero action lacks dedicated direct-launch coverage
findings.rationale: The proposal depends on WhatsApp remaining an immediate shortcut/fallback, but current test coverage was reported as missing for this behavior.
findings.suggested_action: Require widget/controller test proving WhatsApp hero action invokes the WhatsApp/fallback launcher directly and does not open the canonical sheet.

findings.title: Web anonymous runtime gate needs Playwright coverage
findings.rationale: The critical operational contract is web anonymous gate -> promotion surface, with no phone login and no auto-open app before CTA. Widget tests alone are insufficient for browser/runtime behavior.
findings.suggested_action: Require source-owned Playwright coverage for web anonymous desktop/mobile-frame favorite or action gate behavior.

findings.title: Sheet-first Convidar navigation contract is untested
findings.rationale: Current tests validate direct navigation to InviteShareRoute. The proposed behavior needs the inverse: first open canonical sheet, then route only after explicit action.
findings.suggested_action: Require test: tap Convidar -> canonical action sheet visible -> tap full composer action -> InviteShareRoute pushed; fail if route is pushed immediately.

findings.title: Promotion variant must prove shared action-sheet anatomy
findings.rationale: The proposal purpose is visual/surface canonicalization. Existing modal tests validate content but not shared surface anatomy.
findings.suggested_action: Require promotion gate test asserting the canonical action-sheet component/keys are used and phone-login UI is absent on web anonymous.

findings.title: CI execution evidence for runtime navigation must be explicit
findings.rationale: Integration/runtime tests are only valuable if the correct runner includes them. The proposal must name the commands/CI-equivalent path.
findings.suggested_action: Implementation TODO must list exact focused Flutter, analyzer, rule matrix, build web, and Playwright commands before delivery.

findings.title: System share tests may rely on fake launcher only
findings.rationale: Fake launcher validates payload formatting but not platform/plugin behavior. This is acceptable for focused unit coverage but weaker than runtime proof.
findings.suggested_action: Keep fake-launcher assertions for determinism and add runtime/browser smoke only where platform behavior is release-critical.

findings.title: Invite backend mutation coverage is outside proposal but will matter if composer logic changes
findings.rationale: The UX proposal does not change backend invite semantics, but any implementation that changes send/share-code/status behavior must add backend/controller coverage.
findings.suggested_action: Keep backend invite semantics out of this TODO; if touched, require mutation/contract tests.
